summary: Iteration 5: Tested new features - Report PDF generation, Logo upload, Audit log module. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend components verified working.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/organizacion/logo accepts PNG file and stores as base64 data URI
DELETE /api/organizacion/logo removes logo from organization
POST /api/organizacion/logo rejects non-image files (400 error)
Logo appears in GET /api/organizacion response
GET /api/auditoria returns paginated audit logs with total count
GET /api/auditoria?entidad=donante filters by entity type
GET /api/auditoria?accion=crear filters by action type
GET /api/auditoria supports skip/limit pagination
GET /api/auditoria/export returns CSV file with correct headers
Creating donante triggers audit log entry (entidad=donante, accion=crear)
Creating donativo triggers audit log entry (entidad=donativo, accion=crear)
Creating CFDI triggers audit log entry (entidad=cfdi, accion=crear)
Creating report triggers audit log entry (entidad=reporte, accion=crear)
GET /api/reportes/{report_id}/pdf returns valid PDF (starts with %PDF)
GET /api/reportes/{invalid_id}/pdf returns 404
POST /api/reportes/plantillas creates template
GET /api/reportes/plantillas returns template list
POST /api/reportes with template_id creates report from template
GET /api/auditoria requires authentication (401 without token)
GET /api/auditoria/export requires authentication (401 without token)
Auditoría page loads with table, filters (entidad, accion), and CSV export button
Configuración page shows 'Logo de la Organización' card with upload button
Reportes page has tabs (Reportes/Plantillas) and 'Generar Reporte' button
Plantillas tab shows templates with 'Nueva Plantilla' button
Report dropdown menu has 'Descargar PDF', 'Marcar enviado', 'Eliminar' options
Sidebar includes 'Auditoría' navigation link
seed_data_creation: Created test donantes, donativos, CFDIs, reports, and templates during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 tested new features: Report PDF generation (/api/reportes/{id}/pdf), Logo upload (/api/organizacion/logo), and Audit log module (/api/auditoria). All backend endpoints work correctly. Frontend pages (AuditoriaPage, ConfiguracionPage logo card, ReportesPage PDF download) all verified working. Audit log automatically tracks donante/donativo/cfdi/report creation with user info and details. Logo is stored as base64 data URI in organizaciones collection. PDF generation uses ReportLab and includes org logo if uploaded.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured
